title: the check-in
line: recurring and lighter — couples, close friends. highs, lows, one thing unsaid.

phases.title: arrival
phases.move: Open lightly — this is a check-in, not a summit. Ask how the stretch since they last sat has been, one line each.

phases.title: highs
phases.move: One high each — something that was genuinely good. Let them enjoy it a moment before moving.

phases.title: lows
phases.move: One low each. Hold it without fixing it; make sure each low is acknowledged by the room before moving on.

phases.title: one thing unsaid
phases.move: Invite one thing each has been meaning to say and hasn't. Permission-first: they may pass, and passing is fine.

phases.title: the close
phases.move: CLOSE the sitting: reflect the shape of what was shared, both-sided, warm and brief. One small thing each might carry into the week. No verdict.
